metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for Autodesk Revit and BIM workflows — Dynamo scripting, model auditing, clash detection, IFC export, and full BIM automation.

plugins.name: revit-bim
plugins.description: Connect Claude to Autodesk Revit. Generate Dynamo scripts, audit models, detect clashes, manage parameters, create schedules, export IFC, and automate BIM workflows from plain language.
